name: @agenta-spike/nextjs-workflow
description: Spike app: Next.js 16 + Vercel Workflow DevKit + AI SDK v6 + raw OpenTelemetry. Verifies tracing behavior inside `use step` functions and `DurableAgent` from @workflow/ai.

scripts.probe: pnpm run probe:plain && pnpm run probe:agent
scripts.lint: eslint --config ../../eslint.config.mjs app/ workflows/ test/ instrumentation.ts instrumentation.node.ts --max-warnings 0
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --config ../../eslint.config.mjs app/ workflows/ test/ instrumentation.ts instrumentation.node.ts --max-warnings 0 --fix
